operators.py: Replaced _jaccard(): synonym-bridge detection — returns 0.5 when any token has a direct synonym in the other label's token set
Updated _token_set(): now combines space-split tokens + camelCase-split tokens
scorer.py: Added _STRONG_RELATIONS: frozenset of functionally meaningful relation types
Updated _score_plausibility(): +0.1 bonus when all path relations are strong/functional
Note: _score_novelty cross-domain bonus was already present from run_001 — now actually triggers

hypothesis_predictions.H1: C2 mean_total should increase vs run_001 due to cross-domain hypotheses scoring higher
hypothesis_predictions.H3: cross-domain novelty should exceed same-domain novelty due to the +0.2 bonus now triggering

deterministic_seed: no external randomness; BFS order is deterministic via list iteration
